description_long: This object consists of a medium-sized wooden barrel with visible metal hoops encircling its body, giving it a classic, rustic appearance. The barrel is vertically oriented and mounted on a circular wooden base, which appears to provide stability. Attached to the base is a mechanical arm holding a round, flat disc painted with concentric blue, white, and red rings, resembling a target. A tall, black vertical pole extends from the center of the barrel's top, suggesting it may serve as a support or functional component. The wood grain and metal bands are clearly visible, and the target disc is brightly colored, standing out against the more muted tones of the barrel. This object could be used in urban recreational or event settings, such as fairs, parks, or themed entertainment areas.
description: A wooden barrel with metal hoops, mounted on a base with a mechanical arm holding a colorful target disc and a tall black pole extending from the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel, the full circular target disc with blue, white, and red rings, and the central black pole.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the side of the barrel, the mechanical arm connecting the target disc to the base, and more detail of the mounting structure.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the barrel and the base, with the target disc mostly hidden from sight.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the barrel, the mechanical arm, and a partial side view of the target disc.
